meta.script: { "@context" : "https://schema.org", "@type" : "WebSite", "name" : "CData Software", "alternateName" : "CData Software - The Leader In Data Connectivity", "url" : "https://www.cdata.com", "potentialAction": { "@type": "SearchAction", "target": "https://www.cdata.com/search/?q={search_term_string}", "query-input": "required name=search_term_string" } }

div.span: CData's data integration solutions provide flexible deployment options across data movement and live connectivity through Sync, Arc, and Connect AI.

div.a: Managed MCP Platform CData Connect AI

div.span: CData's inclusion in the 2025 report underscores the growing recognition of our innovative solutions and our ability to address the evolving demands of modern data integration.
Software providers can embed enterprise-grade connectivity to 350+ systems directly inside their products.

div.a: AI and agent connectivity Ship AI features that can reason and act on real customer sources
Product integrations Deliver customer-facing features that operate on live customer data

div.span: Palantir Technologies has expanded its relationship with CData's Embedded business unit to enhance data connectivity in Palantir Foundry, enabling users to connect to hundreds of data sources through CData's embedded connectors.
Sign up for our limited series covering useful prompts, tips, and future CData MCP releases that will make Claude your undisputed work bestie.
CData's Connect AI platform brings MCP connectivity to Microsoft Copilot Studio and Microsoft Agent 365.
Access comprehensive tools, SDKs, and resources to integrate CData connectivity solutions into your applications with enterprise-grade data drivers and APIs.

div.a: AI / MCP Build with fully-managed MCP servers to connect AI tools with your data.
.NET Use standard ADO.NET Providers to build connected .NET apps
Python Use DB-API modules to work with data in Python
Java Use standard JDBC Drivers to build connected Java apps
SQL Use standard SQL to integrate data with SQL Server

div.class: l2-section highlight bracket-box bracket-box--resolve bracket-box--menu nonTab

div.span: CData's developer community connects thousands of data professionals who share solutions, best practices, and expertise for integrating enterprise data sources through collaborative forums and comprehensive resources.
Software providers can embed enterprise-grade connectivity to 350+ systems directly inside their products.

div.a: AI and agent connectivity Ship AI features that can reason and act on real customer sources
Product integrations Deliver customer-facing features that operate on live customer data

div.class: l2-section highlight bracket-box bracket-box--resolve bracket-box--menu nonTab

div.span: State of AI Data Connectivity Report: 2026 Outlook
Based on research with 200+ data & AI leaders and insights from AI pioneers at Microsoft and AWS, this report is the first to examine how data integration maturity drives AI success.

div.class: l2-section highlight bracket-box bracket-box--resolve bracket-box--menu nonTab

div.span: Join data leaders, AI innovators, and CData experts to explore the future of enterprise data infrastructure. Discover how to build AI-ready foundations, deploy intelligent agents, and transform your organization's data strategy.

You will be automatically redirected to our home page. If you are not forwarded, click here

CData is the data layer that makes AI work in production—live connectivity and replication across 350+ sources, semantic context, and built-in governance. Powering AI for Databricks, Microsoft, Google, Palantir, and 10,000+ customers worldwide.
